title: corybas ecarinatus
intro: Corybas ecarinatus, also known as the Australian greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the production of venom by certain species of snakes. The health benefits of Corybas ecarinatus include its potential to neutralize snake venom and provide relief from snake bites, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a powder or infused in water, and it has been used by indigenous Australians in various herbal preparations.
